gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community showcase up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot watering plants in a greenhouse. The plants represent community apps. The pollinations bee is hovering nearby with a tiny clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard.
